_2fa.text: On first login Blink sends a 2FA code (e-mail/SMS). Enter it ONCE into the state 'blinkcam.<n>.twoFactorCode' (Objects tab). The refresh token is then persisted — no 2FA on later restarts.

pollIntervalSeconds.label: Poll interval (seconds)
pollIntervalSeconds.help: One Blink cloud poll = battery + status + motion + thumbnail together. It does NOT wake the camera, so it does NOT drain the camera battery (only the manual snapshot button wakes it). 30 s is blinkpy's own default (same as Home Assistant) and is safe; the minimum is 30 s to avoid hammering Blink's unofficial API. Lower = fresher motion image.

snapshotOnMotion.label: Auto-update image on motion
snapshotOnMotion.help: Refresh the camera image when Blink reports a new motion thumbnail.

imageSource.label: Camera image source

options.label: Blink motion thumbnail (app image, shows the person)

imageSource.help: Thumbnail = same image as the Blink app (recommended). Snapshot = wakes the camera for a fresh photo (often empty, ~10-30s cloud delay).

snapWaitSeconds.label: Snapshot wait (seconds)
snapWaitSeconds.help: Blink is cloud-only; wait this long after requesting a new image before downloading it.

pythonBin.label: Python 3 binary
pythonBin.help: Used once to create a private venv in the instance data dir.

blinkpyVersion.label: blinkpy version (pinned)
blinkpyVersion.help: If Blink changes their flow, bump this and restart to upgrade blinkpy.
